# resend_api_key (Resource)

Manages a Resend API key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_api_key" "example" {
  name       = "my-api-key"
  permission = "sending_access"
  domain_id  = resend_domain.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The API key name.

### Optional

- `domain_id` (String) Restrict to a specific domain. Only used with `sending_access`.
- `permission` (String) `full_access` or `sending_access`. Defaults to `full_access`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) API key identifier.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated API key token. Only available at creation time.
